status.saveBlocked: Cannot save while in Read-Only mode. Close and reopen with write access to save changes.
status.excelOpen: Excel has this workbook open. Close Excel and try saving again.

lock.title: File is locked
lock.message: This file is being edited by {{user}} on {{machine}} since {{time}}.

conflict.title: Conflict detected
conflict.message: {{count}} module(s) have been modified in both Verde and Excel.

saveConfirm.title: Unsaved Changes
saveConfirm.message: Do you want to save changes to {{filename}}?
saveConfirm.messageWindow: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save all changes before closing?

trust.title: Setup Required
trust.message: Please enable 'Trust access to the VBA project object model' in Excel settings.

editor.rightClickTip: Tip: Right-click any .xlsm file → Open with Verde

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoSync: Auto sync to Excel on save

fileWatcher.conflict: {{filename}} was modified externally. Reload from disk or keep your changes?

projectNotFound.title: Project not found
projectNotFound.message: The project metadata could not be located. It may have been moved or deleted.

projectMetadataCorrupted.title: Project metadata is corrupted
projectMetadataCorrupted.message: The .verde-meta.json file exists but could not be parsed. Check the file for manual edits or restore from backup.

errors.treeSitterWasmMissing: VBA grammar (tree-sitter-vba.wasm) is missing or failed to load. Run `just fetch-wasm` and reload.
errors.lspNotSpawned: Language server (verde-lsp) binary is missing. Run `just fetch-lsp` and reload.
errors.lspSpawnFailed: Language server (verde-lsp) failed to start. Check that the binary is executable and reload.
errors.lspExited: Language server (verde-lsp) exited unexpectedly. VBA intelligence is unavailable until you reload.
errors.lspInitializeFailed: Language server (verde-lsp) rejected initialization. VBA intelligence is unavailable.
